pi_items.source: Task description strictly requires: 'Bottom depth: 30 meters'. Verifier permits 25 to 35m.
Task description strictly requires: 'Bottom time: 40 minutes'. Verifier checks duration string for 39, 40, or 41.
Task description strictly requires: 'Gas: Air (21% O2, 0% He)'. Verifier checks 20<=O2<=22 and He==0.
Task description specifically mentions: 'plan a recreational dive'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official Subsurface SampleDivesV2.ssrf logbook (which contains real dive data from Hoodsport, WA) and requires creating a new recreational dive plan. The exact parameters required are 30 meters depth, 40 minutes duration, and standard air (21% O2, 0% He), as explicitly requested in the task instructions and scoring logic.
